title: Strike Suit Infinity
description:
One universe, three titles

Strike Suit Infinity is an arcade spin-off of Strike Suit Zero, that focuses solely on combo combat. Its single-player alternative, Strike Suit Zero: Director's Cut, provides a 10 hour story-driven, mission based experience with all the same incredible combat. In the Director's Cut, players battle across massive fleet battles where your dogfighting skills will decide Earth's fate...

If you purchase or upgrade to the Director's Cut bundle you will receive:• The original Strike Suit Zero (Legacy product)

• The Director's Cut of Strike Suit Zero which brings...

• Significant graphical improvements, a restructured campaign and more content

• 18 missions and over 10 hours of space combat across two epic campaigns.

• 6 flyable ships, including 3 unique Strike Suits

• Fast, frantic space combat: dogfight pilots, battle fleets, and destroy capital ships piece by piece.

• 13 unique locations, an acclaimed soundtrack, and full controller, joystick, and multi-monitor support.

• Multiple endings shaped by your choices.

Об игре

Features 

• A frantic high score chaser where survival is the only goal and skill is the only thing that matters.

• Build your multiplier and race to the top of the leaderboards.

• 3 unique mecha Strike Suits to fly, each offering a unique combat experience.

• Set in the Strike Suit Zero universe, but does not require Strike Suit Zero to play.

• Fast, frantic space combat: dogfight pilots, battle massive fleets, and destroy capital ships piece by piece.

• Manage your strategy: spend credits between rounds on upgrades and reinforcements to maximize your next wave.

• Vicious new enemy types that will push your skills to the limit.

• An acclaimed soundtrack by Paul Ruskay (Homeworld) featuring vocalist Kokia and Subsource.

• Full controller, joystick, and multi-monitor support.

A Lean, Mean, Arcade ExperienceStrike Suit Infinity throws you into relentless, wave-based action where no two encounters feel the same. Dogfight skilled enemy pilots, engage multiple targets at once, and take on colossal capital ships — all while keeping your multiplier alive and your score climbing.

Master the Strike Suit Choose from three distinct mecha Strike Suits and switch between Pursuit Mode for raw speed and power, and Strike Mode for precise, highly maneuverable combat. Customize your weapon load-outs to tailor your fighting style, and make every engagement count.

Chase the Leaderboard There is no finish line, only the fight for survival. Take down waves of enemies as fast as possible, build your multiplier, and push your score as high as it will go. Every second alive is another second to pull ahead of the competition.

Manage Your Strategy Between rounds, spend credits on upgrades and reinforcements to strengthen your position for the next wave. The longer you survive, the bigger your score — but only if you spend wisely.

Capital Ship DestructionNo target is too big. Capital ships can be dismantled piece by piece, with turrets picked off one by one and critical weak-points targeted to blow out entire sections of their superstructure. These are battles of skill and strategy that reward players who take the time to study their enemy.
description_short: Strike Suit Infinity is a frantic high score chaser set in the Strike Suit Zero universe. Your skill is the only thing that matters and whatever combat experience you've had so far is irrelevant. There is no end to the enemies you'll face. There is no winning. There is only the fight for survival.
